subject: Donphan, a large armored elephant-like Pokemon with prominent curved tusks, standing on rocky terrain
description: A large, heavily built elephant-like creature stands on a rocky outcropping against a grey-blue sky. The creature has a rounded, armored dark grey body with black banding around its trunk, legs, and back, forming a plate-like protective shell. Two curved white tusks extend prominently from its lower jaw. A short trunk hangs downward. The creature's posture is stable and imposing — planted firmly on the rocks. The atmosphere is overcast and rugged.
foreground: large armored grey elephant-like creature with curved tusks standing on rocks
background: rocky terrain under a grey-blue overcast sky
